# REQ-FR-260001: Sign-in entry on the public landing page

- ID: FR-260001
- Class: FR (Functional Requirement)
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-05-20
- Owner: Repository owner

## Statement

The public landing page at `crystord.com` shall include a sign-in entry point (form or button)
that authenticates the user via an API call and redirects to `app.crystord.com` on success.

## Rationale

Users need to be able to sign in to the SaaS application without leaving the landing page context
first. Keeping the sign-in embedded in the public site lowers friction while preserving the
separation between the static landing experience and the authenticated SaaS shell.

## Acceptance Criteria

- A sign-in entry is visible on the landing page without navigating to another URL.
- On successful authentication the browser is redirected to `app.crystord.com`.
- On failure an inline error message is shown without a full page reload.
- The sign-in destination URL is read from `PUBLIC_APP_SIGN_IN_URL` at build time; it is not
  hardcoded in any page or component.
- The landing page itself serves no authenticated or protected content.
